main_event: Bright star-like object rotating at estimated 30,000 feet over oil town of Seria, Borneo, emitting twin vapor jets, visible 40 minutes.
sighted_object: bright star-like obj in sky appearing to rotate, twin vapor trails / twin jets of vapor
witness_description: Hundreds of curious Borneans over the oil town of Seria
interesting_points: Bright star-like obj appearing to rotate at estimated alt of 30,000'
Twin vapor trails / twin jets of vapor
